race.comment: HANUMAN (15) couldn't match the turn of foot of a very impressive winner last start at Scone but held his own back in eighth in a bunched finish. Gets weight off with the 2kg claimer engaged and expecting him to be more prominent this time. Can atone. DENMAN FORCE (3) qas too bad to be true at Gosford last start after lifting strongly to score two runs back. Has the pace to offset the wide alley and find a good position. Best form puts him right in this. ANGIE'S SISTER (11) returns from a spell of nine months and did win first-up last time in work over 900m at Wellington. In the mix. DENMAN BANDIT (6) rolled forward last time out and boxed on to finish a head from the winner in third at Quirindi over 1000m. Has been in solid form this campaign with a win and a placing from four starts. Minor claims.
